title: A Girl Admiring the Sunset
overview: Happy-go-lucky boy Shu encounters a mysterious girl, and is drawn into time warp that thrusts him into a hellish future.

title: A Boy and a Mad King
overview: Lala-Ru is captured by Abelia’s men, but her magical pendant escapes with Shu at the last moment.

title: A Feast in the Dark
overview: While imprisoned, Shu meets a fragile blue-eyed girl named Sara who found her way to this hellish future under similar circumstances.

title: Discord
overview: The young soldiers have their marching orders: Search the entire ship from top to bottom for Lala-Ru’s missing pendant.

title: Murder
overview: King Hamdo’s frustration reaches a boiling point as the mission to recover the pendant continues to be fruitless.

title: Disappearance in a Sandstorm
overview: The young soldiers are now faced with a tour of duty as they leave Hellywood to seek more soldiers.

title: Night of Flight
overview: While in prison, Shu uncovers an unbelievable mystery and the fate of this hellish future suddenly falls squarely in his hands.

title: Two Lone Souls
overview: Now that Shu is on the run, he must face a whole new set of dangers in the wild desert.

title: In the Chasm
overview: Shu and Lala-ru don’t realize it, but the village they’ve encountered is actually the target of King Hamdo’s revenge.

title: Prelude to Chaos
overview: Shu and Lala-Ru are tentatively welcomed by the villagers of Zari Bars.

title: Eve of Destruction
overview: Sis, one of the citizens of Zari Bars, finds Sara in the desert, on the verge of death.

title: This Bloody Earth
overview: Sara warns the people of Zari Bars that an impending attack from Hellywood is eminent.

title: Now and Then, Here and There
overview: Nabuca finds himself at a crossroad: Continue killing for the empty promise of going home after the war ends, or listen to his heart and put down his gun.
